challenge.title: Kratak pokušaj da se razgovara o zabavi i interesovanjima
challenge.description:
Ovaj test proverava vaše razumevanje o zabavi, interesima, pozivnicama i vremenu za present perfect.

Da bi prošao test, moraš tačno odgovoriti na najmanje 9 od 10 pitanja koja su navedena ispod.

Pročitajte svako pitanje i izaberite tačan odgovor. Svako pitanje ima samo jedan tačan odgovor.

Za pristupačnost, pisani materijali su dostupni studentima sa smanjenom/invaliditetom sluha; preporučujemo da ih koristite samo ako je to neophodno.

questions.text: Šta znače to be into, passionate about, na interested in?
Koja od sljedećih tvrdnji je tačna za ovu rečenicu: She has worked on that project?
questions.answer: Čin je počeo ranije i i dalje ima značaj.

distractors: I've been into photography for nearly a decade now.
I've been a cyclist for more than 15 years.
I've been a collector since I was 8 or 9 years old.
questions.text: Koja je rečenica koja ne objašnjava tačno vreme akcije ili vreme početka?
questions.answer: I've been into rock climbing and rafting since a while now.

questions.text: as a hobby Šta to znači?

distractors: I don't have tried rock climbing before.
I didn't have tried rock climbing before.
I not have tried rock climbing before.
questions.text: Šta je pogrešno u ovoj rečenici: I have tried rock climbing before?
questions.answer: I haven't tried rock climbing before.

distractors: You must go cycling with me.
Do you go cycling with me today?
questions.text: Da li je bilo koja od sledećih poziva za vožnju biciklama zajedno?
questions.answer: Would you like to go cycling together?

questions.text: Ovo pitanje pita šta o: Why don't we start the meeting now?

distractors: How long have you been into photography? → For nearly a decade.
What kind of figures do you like? → I like sci-fi and fantasy.
questions.answer: What kind of cycling do you enjoy? → You're welcome to join!

questions.text: Tvoja žimska je blizu, pa kažeš: My gym is BLANK the office.
the most Šta otkriva u ovoj rečenici: This task takes the most time?
